ocr_findings.description: The RFI sample document in the image is formatted as a bordered box with visual indentation. OCR renders it as a single-column markdown table with each line as a row. Content is preserved but the visual document-style layout is lost. Cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: Content page on RFI (Request For Information / 情報提供依頼書) covering two purposes: vendor pre-screening and gathering technical information. Body text is accurately captured. The sample RFI document box is rendered as a markdown table, preserving all listed items (情報提供のお願い, 技術の開示依頼, 実績の開示依頼, 技術動向に関して, 期限, sender info). Low-severity table format difference only.
